test-case.description: Returns a result object with Ok / Failures / Warnings / Checks
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Returns a result object with Ok / Failures / Warnings / Checks

test-case.description: Includes a PowerShell version check that passes on PS 5.1+
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Includes a PowerShell version check that passes on PS 5.1+

test-case.description: Includes an execution policy check
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Includes an execution policy check

test-case.description: Includes a git CLI check
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Includes a git CLI check

test-case.description: Includes a gh CLI check (always present, may warn)
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Includes a gh CLI check (always present, may warn)

test-case.description: Includes a Git-Sync module check
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Includes a Git-Sync module check

test-case.description: Reports Ok=$true when every check passes
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Reports Ok=$true when every check passes

test-case.description: Honors -Quiet (does not write to host)
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Honors -Quiet (does not write to host)

test-case.description: Each check has Name, Status, Detail, and Fix properties
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Each check has Name, Status, Detail, and Fix properties

test-case.description: Produces banner output when -Quiet is not specified
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Produces banner output when -Quiet is not specified

test-case.description: Reports HEALTHY result line when there are no failures
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Reports HEALTHY result line when there are no failures

test-case.description: Accepts a -RepoPath parameter and uses it for module lookup
test-case.name: Test-GitSyncEnvironment.Accepts a -RepoPath parameter and uses it for module lookup

test-case.description: Throws when git push fails
test-case.name: Invoke-GitDeploy failure paths.Throws when git push fails

test-case.description: Throws when staging fails
test-case.name: Invoke-GitDeploy failure paths.Throws when staging fails

test-case.description: Throws "Not in a Git repository" when rev-parse fails
test-case.name: Invoke-GitDeploy failure paths.Throws "Not in a Git repository" when rev-parse fails

test-case.description: Emits a warning when remote connectivity check fails but continues
test-case.name: Invoke-GitDeploy failure paths.Emits a warning when remote connectivity check fails but continues

test-case.description: Refuses to overwrite an existing tag without -Force
test-case.name: New-GitRelease failure paths.Refuses to overwrite an existing tag without -Force

test-case.description: Throws when the underlying deploy fails (rollback path)
test-case.name: New-GitRelease failure paths.Throws when the underlying deploy fails (rollback path)

test-case.description: Computes the next version in AutoBump mode
test-case.name: New-GitRelease failure paths.Computes the next version in AutoBump mode

test-case.description: Strips uppercase V prefix
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion edge cases.Strips uppercase V prefix

test-case.description: Resets patch when minor is bumped
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion edge cases.Resets patch when minor is bumped

test-case.description: Resets minor and patch when major is bumped
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion edge cases.Resets minor and patch when major is bumped

test-case.description: Returns a hashtable containing ExitCode, Success, and Output
test-case.name: Invoke-GitCommand contract.Returns a hashtable containing ExitCode, Success, and Output

test-case.description: IgnoreError returns Success=$false instead of throwing
test-case.name: Invoke-GitCommand contract.IgnoreError returns Success=$false instead of throwing

test-case.description: Test-GitRepository returns $false when git itself throws
test-case.name: Catch-block coverage on probe functions.Test-GitRepository returns $false when git itself throws

test-case.description: Test-GitRemoteConnectivity returns $false when git throws
test-case.name: Catch-block coverage on probe functions.Test-GitRemoteConnectivity returns $false when git throws

test-case.description: Test-GhAuthentication returns $false when gh throws
test-case.name: Catch-block coverage on probe functions.Test-GhAuthentication returns $false when gh throws

test-case.description: Get-LatestTag returns 0.0.0 when git throws
test-case.name: Catch-block coverage on probe functions.Get-LatestTag returns 0.0.0 when git throws

test-case.description: Invoke-GitCommand returns Success=$false with IgnoreError when git throws
test-case.name: Catch-block coverage on probe functions.Invoke-GitCommand returns Success=$false with IgnoreError when git throws

test-case.description: Creates a commit when staged changes exist
test-case.name: Invoke-GitDeploy success-with-commit branch.Creates a commit when staged changes exist

test-case.description: Prints rollback hints and throws when an inner operation fails
test-case.name: New-GitRelease rollback guidance branch.Prints rollback hints and throws when an inner operation fails

test-case.description: Falls back to legacy gh auth switch when --user fails
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount fallback branch.Falls back to legacy gh auth switch when --user fails

test-case.description: Returns $false when gh itself throws inside the try block
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount fallback branch.Returns $false when gh itself throws inside the try block

test-case.description: Returns $null when the path does not exist
test-case.name: Get-GitHubAccountFromRepo.Returns $null when the path does not exist

test-case.description: Returns $null when git remote get-url fails
test-case.name: Get-GitHubAccountFromRepo.Returns $null when git remote get-url fails

test-case.description: Parses an HTTPS GitHub remote URL
test-case.name: Get-GitHubAccountFromRepo.Parses an HTTPS GitHub remote URL

test-case.description: Parses an SSH GitHub remote URL
test-case.name: Get-GitHubAccountFromRepo.Parses an SSH GitHub remote URL

test-case.description: Allows usernames with hyphens (regression test for v2.3.0)
test-case.name: Get-GitHubAccountFromRepo.Allows usernames with hyphens (regression test for v2.3.0)

test-case.description: Returns $null for a non-GitHub remote
test-case.name: Get-GitHubAccountFromRepo.Returns $null for a non-GitHub remote

test-case.description: Returns $false and warns on empty target account
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount.Returns $false and warns on empty target account

test-case.description: Returns $false and warns on whitespace target account
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount.Returns $false and warns on whitespace target account

test-case.description: Returns $false when gh CLI is not installed
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount.Returns $false when gh CLI is not installed

test-case.description: Returns $true and is a no-op when already on the target account
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount.Returns $true and is a no-op when already on the target account

test-case.description: Returns $true after a successful switch
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount.Returns $true after a successful switch

test-case.description: Honors -WhatIf and does not invoke gh auth switch
test-case.name: Switch-GhAccount.Honors -WhatIf and does not invoke gh auth switch

test-case.description: Increments patch by default
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion.Increments patch by default

test-case.description: Increments minor
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion.Increments minor

test-case.description: Increments major
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion.Increments major

test-case.description: Handles v-prefixed versions
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion.Handles v-prefixed versions

test-case.description: Defaults to 0.0.0 when given malformed input and warns
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion.Defaults to 0.0.0 when given malformed input and warns

test-case.description: Adds prerelease suffix when requested
test-case.name: Get-NextVersion.Adds prerelease suffix when requested

test-case.description: Returns true when git says we are inside a work tree
test-case.name: Test-GitRepository.Returns true when git says we are inside a work tree

test-case.description: Returns false when git exits non-zero
test-case.name: Test-GitRepository.Returns false when git exits non-zero

test-case.description: Returns true on successful ls-remote
test-case.name: Test-GitRemoteConnectivity.Returns true on successful ls-remote

test-case.description: Returns false on failed ls-remote
test-case.name: Test-GitRemoteConnectivity.Returns false on failed ls-remote

test-case.description: Returns a success hashtable on exit code 0
test-case.name: Invoke-GitCommand.Returns a success hashtable on exit code 0

test-case.description: Throws on non-zero exit code by default
test-case.name: Invoke-GitCommand.Throws on non-zero exit code by default

test-case.description: Does not throw when IgnoreError is set
test-case.name: Invoke-GitCommand.Does not throw when IgnoreError is set

test-case.description: Returns the latest tag stripped of v-prefix
test-case.name: Get-LatestTag.Returns the latest tag stripped of v-prefix

test-case.description: Returns 0.0.0 when no tags exist
test-case.name: Get-LatestTag.Returns 0.0.0 when no tags exist

test-case.description: Returns false when gh is not installed
test-case.name: Test-GhAuthentication.Returns false when gh is not installed

test-case.description: Returns true when gh auth status succeeds
test-case.name: Test-GhAuthentication.Returns true when gh auth status succeeds

test-case.description: Should not throw in a mocked repo with no changes
test-case.name: Invoke-GitDeploy.Should not throw in a mocked repo with no changes

test-case.description: Should bump version when using AutoBump parameter set
test-case.name: New-GitRelease.Should bump version when using AutoBump parameter set

test-case.description: Should use explicit version when using Manual parameter set
test-case.name: New-GitRelease.Should use explicit version when using Manual parameter set
